product.title: COVERGIRL Advanced Radiance Age Defying Foundation Makeup Creamy Beige, 1 oz
featureBullets: Instantly restore your skin's youthful appearance with this smooth liquid foundation that helps reduce the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles and imperfections. Available in various shades from light to deep to provide a radiant finish for all skin tones

A great makeup look starts with a smooth, beautiful base. Foundation can even skin tone, cover redness and provide a blank canvas for blush, bronzer, contour & highlighter. Long wearing and comfortable, our foundation will help your natural beauty shine

Whether you are going for a classic look that's the foundation of your style, trying an advanced technique, looking for a skin treatment or just to treat your skin, COVERGIRL makeup has the professional quality makeup to enhance your natural radiance

COVERGIRL makeup gives you the makeup you need to be who you are. Fill your makeup bag with COVERGIRL products for eyes, lips, and face. COVERGIRL makeup helps you achieve the perfect brows, lashes, lips and contouring to show off your individual style

COVERGIRL has your makeup needs covered with a wide range of makeup products for eyes that pop, glossier lips, a flawless foundation. Whatever your beauty needs may be, there's a COVERGIRL product for every style & look. COVERGIRL: I am what I make up
product.description: This smooth liquid foundation with an exclusive Olay Amino-Peptide Complex blends into the skin, covering fine lines and wrinkles, for radiant, beautiful coverage that actually helps give you a youthful appearance. Pair with Advanced Radiance Pressed Powder to set your look.

specification.value: #5,683 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #65 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation provides good sheer coverage and is among the best they've used, with a lightweight feel that's not heavy or greasy. They appreciate its smooth application, dewy matte finish, and how it keeps skin moisturized without feeling oily. The color receives mixed feedback - while some say it matches their skin tone exactly, others find it too dark. Customers consider it good value for money.

reviews.reviewText: I've been using this foundation for nearly 2 decades, it's a silicone based foundation with a satin finish. You can apply it with your fingers or a brush. It is so forgiving and it doesn't crease. Use the matching pressed powder to set it for a matte finish. It lasts all day, even in extreme heat and despite sweating and it holds up in extreme cold. I never have to touch it up throughout the day. I don't use a primer, just wash and my moisturizer mist. I never use a concealer - this foundation is full coverage and hides my redness and eye circles. Minimal transfer. Works great with powder blush and eye shadow, never used a cream eye shadow. Great product for the price! Formula hasn't changed much over the years. I don't notice oxidizing through the day like YouTubers claim. I've tried other foundations because I was a dewy glowy finish but I always come back to this and I suppose a matte finish is my go- to. Normal skin, 40 years old, shade 110
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 18, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I'm 72. After many years, I finally decided to switch from my old foundation and try this. It glided on so gently and immediately filled any pores I had. I didn't have to force it into my wrinkles as I had to do with my other one. The color is perfect and it doesn't sting my eyes like many facial creams do - that's the reason I stuck with my old one for 20 years. I bought two more.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 25, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I’ve been using the COVERGIRL Advanced Radiance Age Defying Foundation in Classic Ivory for a while now, and I’m super impressed. It has a smooth, lightweight formula that feels comfortable on my skin all day without feeling heavy or cakey. What I love most is how well it hides wrinkles and fine lines — it gives a natural, radiant finish that brightens my complexion without settling into creases. The coverage is buildable, so you can go from a light everyday look to fuller coverage without any issues. It matches my skin tone perfectly, and it blends effortlessly. Plus, it lasts through long days and doesn’t require constant touch-ups. Overall, a fantastic foundation that helps me look fresh and youthful — highly recommend it!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 13, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Good coverage. It is on thick side. It last for the day. The texture feels alright. It gives a natural look. If my pores are not closed well it does burn my face some. Not some thing I use everyday. The quality is alright. The value is ok.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 2, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Love this-Won't Go Back to Mineral Powder Foundation
reviews.reviewText: I ordered this foundation recently based on other reviews and I really like it. I used Covergirl products a lot in my youth but switched to mineral powder foundation in my 30s (thanks to those persuading infomercials) which I loved at the time (except the price). When I started to develop fine lines around my eyes I found the mineral powder foundation settled into them and made me look older. (I'm now mid 40s). This foundation provides a medium to full coverage (depending on amount used) which I like but still looks natural. It is very creamy, feels light, and does not settle into my fine lines. It doesn't feel like I'm wearing makeup. I ordered two shades, soft honey and classic ivory (based on what was available on Amazon at the time) and blend the two to match my skin tone, which it does perfectly. I saw online that when trying to decide between a lighter or darker foundation to go with the darker one so I figured I could experiment with what works best for me. The classic ivory alone would be too light for my light to medium skin tone. The two blend perfectly with my skin tone and there are no "orange-ish" (aka oompa loompa) tones whatsoever. If you're unsure about the shades, I recommend going to the Covergirl website, the shades displayed there seem to show the true color more than on Amazon. I also like the bottle, how it dispenses the product and being able to see how much is left. I use Covergirl Advanced Radiance pressed powder sparingly to set it. It lasts all day with maybe a light touch up with powder occasionally. It does not leave a makeup residue when using my phone, yet washes off easily. Will continue using this product. UPDATE: 9/17/2014 I just wanted to add to my 5 star review of this product. I just now opened a second bottle of this Covergirl foundation. I purchased my 1st bottle in April and to just now be on my second bottle, I am SO IMPRESSED that the product lasted me that long and I wear makeup every single day. I'm still on my 1st bottle of the darker foundation that I purchased at the same time (I mix with the lighter color). I bought my second bottle at Walmart as it was cheaper, but still what a great buy to have a product that delivers quality and value.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on April 29, 2014

reviews.reviewText: Love this product. Carefree ordering ….and shipping from the seller was free!

reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Arab Emirates on April 9, 2024

reviews.reviewText: I bought this foundation on a whim after watching beauty guru Jessica Braun's video where she has declared this foundation mixed with Missha's BB cream her "holy grail". We have similar shades so I purchased her shades and they go on absolutely beautifully. The foundation has a beautiful finish - satin like - and lasts all day. During the pandemic time, it isn't rubbing off onto my mask like the Maybelline Fit Me I was wearing prior. It also helps even out my skin tone while still showing through freckles and feeling like "me". Between the two products I spent $25 (half of what I would spend on "high end") and I honestly like it more. Do yourself a favor and try both products! 5/5 and definitely recommend.
